sb_prompt: DISCUSS CRIME IN AMERICAN CITIES TODAY.  WHAT ARE YOUR CONCERNS AND THE CONCERNS OF THE OTHER CALLER?  WHAT STEPS CAN BE TAKEN TO REDUCE CRIME?
raw_output:
Participants: Participa (P) and Participante (B)
P: Hi there, I was wondering if we could discuss crime in American cities today. It seems like something that affects both of us directly or indirectly. What are your thoughts on this issue?

B: Yeah, definitely. Crime has been an issue for me as well because I live in a city, but also because it affects my work as a security guard. So what concerns do you have specifically when it comes to crime in cities?
P
